arts.ttl: This Week In Lazio History: February 10-16
arts.sum: This week in Lazio history we witnessed some big wins, particularly the thrashing of Milan in the Coppa Italia semifinal. We also remember Francesco Gabriotti. arts.ttl: Marco Baroni & Lazio: A Pleasant Surprise
arts.sum: Marco Baroni has been a pleasant surprise. He has taken Lazio to fourth place in Serie A with a promising but unready squad. There are stronger teams, but Lazio is right there, fighting for a UEFA Champions League spot. However, where Baroni hasn’t convinced is in big matches. Struggling Against ‘Big’ Teams in Serie A? arts.ttl: Conte Likely to Switch Scheme Due to Napoli Absences
arts.sum: Antonio Conte is ready to go back to the scheme with which Napoli started the season, 3-5-2, to better cope with David Neres being unavailable. The Partenopei have had great success with 4-3-3, but Giacomo Raspadori is more of a second striker.
